chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Acquittal Appeal No.485 of 2022 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ 1. For orders on M.A. No.7652/2023 (Exp/A) 2. For hearing of main case ------------------------------ 20.05.2025 Ms. Amna Ansari, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------------------------- This is a date by court matter. On the last date of hearing, appellant appeared in person and sought adjournment on the ground that his counsel is unwell but today appellant and his counsel are called absent, which shows that they have lost interest to pursue the instant appeal. Therefore, instant criminal acquittal appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
